top_signals.title: UK Retailer TG Jones Restructuring Plan Approved by London Court
top_signals.summary: Ailing UK high-street retailer TG Jones Retail Holdings Ltd won court approval for a sweeping financial restructuring that will shutter more than 100 stores and slash rents to stave off insolvency.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bad Loan Investor APS Eyes €3.3 Billion of Portfolio Deals
top_signals.summary: APS Holding is preparing to step up purchases of distressed debt as it sees higher interest rates and real estate stress starting to dent bank balance sheets.

top_signals.title: Democratic socialist wins Colorado primary
top_signals.summary: Melat Kiros’s victory is latest challenge to Democratic Party leaders ahead of crucial US midterm elections

top_signals.title: New E-commerce duty for small packages set to increase fairness for EU businesses and safety for consumers
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 01 Jul 2026 Starting today, the EU abolishes an outdated customs duty exemption for e-commerce packages worth less than €150.

top_signals.title: Questions and answers on €3 customs duty
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Questions and answers Brussels, 01 Jul 2026 How is the €3 temporary customs duty applied in practice?
The €3 duty is applied per item to consignments with a value up to €150. The measure applies to goods ...
